_comment: Inaccessible/impaired chokepoints (the thesis's sharpest idea: the best ones have no clean ETF). Human-owned source file. The scanner attaches live heat from public PROXIES + news. proxies = the closest LISTED exposure; access = private|foreign|impaired.

chokepoints.name: EUV lithography (ASML monopoly)
chokepoints.how_to_access: ASML is listed (NL/US ADR) — the rare accessible chokepoint; size it.

chokepoints.name: Advanced packaging (TSMC CoWoS/SoIC)
chokepoints.how_to_access: TSM ADR; OSAT names (ASE) as secondary.

chokepoints.name: Heavy rare-earth separation & NdFeB magnets
chokepoints.news_query: rare earth separation magnet China export control
chokepoints.how_to_access: MP/Lynas are subsidy-floor proxies; the true chokepoint (China separation) is un-investable.

chokepoints.name: Precision reducers (Harmonic Drive)
chokepoints.news_query: harmonic drive precision reducer humanoid robot
chokepoints.how_to_access: Harmonic Drive (Tokyo); eroding moat (Schaeffler, China entrants).

chokepoints.name: Real-world manipulation data
chokepoints.news_query: humanoid robot manipulation foundation model data Physical Intelligence Skild
chokepoints.how_to_access: Private (Physical Intelligence, Skild, Tesla). No clean proxy; ROBO/NVDA are picks-and-shovels.

chokepoints.name: Launch + space-grade power (SpaceX, GaAs cells)
chokepoints.news_query: SpaceX Starship launch cadence space solar power
chokepoints.how_to_access: SpaceX private; RKLB is the closest listed launch proxy.

chokepoints.name: Gallium / GaN (radar, EW, RF)
chokepoints.news_query: gallium GaN China export control radar
chokepoints.how_to_access: WOLF impaired (chokepoint != rent); NVTS/QRVO partial GaN exposure.
